query:
INSERT INTO interest_submissions (name, email, interestType, createdAt)
SELECT hl.hostName, hl.email, 'traveler', NOW()
FROM host_listings hl
WHERE hl.email IS NOT NULL AND hl.email != ''
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE interest_submissions.email=interest_submissions.email;
